overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from sidewalks onto wet asphalt streets, crossing illuminated crosswalks and passing large digital billboards in an empty downtown district.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with digital billboards and street furniture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk, passing street lamps and illuminated advertisements on surrounding buildings

entered.detail: tall black lamppost with bright white light illuminating the rainy sidewalk
tall building facade covered with large illuminated digital advertisements displaying product images
towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
wet reflective concrete pavement with visible rain droplets and puddles
low metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the street level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, walking along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with street lamps. Digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street while glass skyscrapers tower in the background. The environment is empty of pedestrians and vehicles, creating a moody, atmospheric urban scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with illuminated crosswalk markings

events.description: steps off the concrete sidewalk onto the wet asphalt street surface
crosses over illuminated white crosswalk markings embedded in the road

agents.ego_description: moving from the sidewalk onto the multi-lane street and walking across the illuminated crosswalk toward the opposite side

entered.detail: dark wet asphalt street surface reflecting neon lights and street lamps
pair of yellow lines marking the center of the road
white illuminated crossing stripes embedded in the road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from sidewalk to street, moving onto the wet asphalt and crossing illuminated crosswalk markings. The road stretches ahead with yellow center lines, flanked by modern office buildings and digital billboards. Rain continues to fall, creating reflective surfaces on the empty multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved ramp with large advertising billboards and safety barriers

events.description: turns right onto an elevated curved ramp with yellow-black warning barriers
passes large red illuminated billboards mounted on the right wall

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn onto an elevated ramp, continuing past safety barriers and large wall-mounted advertisements

entered.detail: short posts with diagonal yellow and black stripes marking the ramp edge
bright orange metal guardrail along the left side of the curved ramp
massive illuminated advertising wall displaying red-themed digital posters with text
elevated asphalt ramp curving to the right with reflective wet surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a right turn onto an elevated curved ramp marked with yellow-black warning posts and orange safety railings. Large red digital billboards dominate the right wall, casting red reflections on the wet pavement. The camera continues along the ramp, passing modern buildings and street lamps in the rainy cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rainy, futuristic city that shifts from a quiet sidewalk to an elevated urban ramp. It begins by walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath towering glass skyscrapers, where digital billboards cast a glow over an empty, atmospheric street. As the camera moves forward, it transitions from the pavement onto the wet asphalt of a multi-lane road, crossing illuminated crosswalks that reflect the surrounding neon lights. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right onto a curved elevated ramp, passing yellow-black warning posts and orange safety railings. Finally, the movement continues along the ramp, flanked by massive red digital billboards that bathe the rainy cityscape in a deep crimson light.
